coverage_note: The bundled ALK population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ALK ALK receptor kinase signaling, fusion activation, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, and kinase-inhibitor response and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000171094: ALK coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ALK findings should be read against ALK receptor kinase signaling, fusion activation, MAPK/PI3K/JAK pathway output, and kinase-inhibitor response; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

ALK fusion model is curated as a ALK marker for ALK fusion and somatic oncology context, Neuroblastoma predisposition review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

ALK activating kinase-domain model is curated as a ALK marker for ALK fusion and somatic oncology context, Neuroblastoma predisposition review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
